llm_eval.notes: C12決定論promotion gate。py_compile OK、test_runtime/test_phase_name_parityでvalidate()を陽性/陰性両分岐でexercise。frontmatter完備(write-scope:none/network:false)。設計良: safe_path()がsymlink成分/absolute/'..'/realpath containmentを個別code付きで拒否しfail-closed、13タスク完全集合(P01..P13順序)・handoff identity・forward-edge DAG・canonical digest再計算を網羅。task_spec_violations()が標準14節を全required化する根拠をdocstringで説明。減点smell: schema_violations()系のJSON-Schema subset(~90行)がbuild-system-handoff.pyとほぼ重複(SSOT不在で仕様drift余地)、`if cond: fail(...)`一行圧縮多用で可読性低、safe_path()を同一relに複数回呼び直しrealpath再計算。重大欠陥なし
